phrases: i want to design a program
routingRules.notice: Context switched to Design Companion (LFA Program Planning).

steps.text: I want to design an intervention program to improve reading levels of students in Karnataka.
Thanks for sharing that. To scope this well, is this intervention for all grades or specific grades at state level?
Primary school only, for English and Hindi.

Understood. So the challenge is low English and Hindi reading levels among primary students in Punjab. If useful, I can guide you through a Logical Framework Approach and generate a full program plan. Ready to begin?
Great. Starting with Impact: if this works over the next 12 months, what long-term student change do you want to see?
Grade 2 and 3 students should read independently.

Good direction. Draft Impact: Grade 2-3 students develop independent reading ability by year end. A suitable impact metric could be: 80% of Grade 2-3 students meet grade-level reading benchmark in annual assessment. For this to happen, what program-level outcomes must become true?
Teachers should run reading circles 3 times a week, and we need monthly student reading tracking.

Noted. Suggested methodology: 2-day in-person foundational training, fortnightly peer observations, and monthly review circles. Likely personas: Principal, Grade 2-3 teachers, CRC/mentor, and parents. Suggested activities plus process metrics: training attendance %, circles per class/week, peer visits/fortnight, % logs updated monthly, and review meetings held with at-risk follow-up. Which key resources are available, and what should I include as required support?
Training venue is available. We need student tracking sheets and reading circle activity cards.

Perfect. Here is your compiled LFA Program Plan:

Program Title: Foundational Reading Improvement Program, Punjab (2026-27)
Impact: Grade 2-3 students read independently by year end
Impact Metric: 80% at/above benchmark in annual assessment
Outcomes: (1) Reading circles run 3x/week (2) Monthly student-level tracking in place
Methodology: 2-day training -> fortnightly peer observation -> monthly review circle
Personas: Principal, Teachers, CRC/Mentor, Parents with clear responsibilities
Activities + Metrics: 5 core activities with weekly/fortnightly/monthly process tracking
Inputs: Venue confirmed; tracking sheet + activity cards required
Duration: 12 months with quarterly review milestones
Is there anything else I can help you with today?
